evidence: voice-agent-session.ts has exactly 4 refs to fallbackInjectedContexts: decl :226 (new Set<string>()), .clear() ONLY in closeOnce() :387, .has() :1000 ('if (this.fallbackInjectedContexts.has(contextId)) return; // at most once per turn'), .add() :1001. No per-turn .delete() anywhere; handleTurnComplete (bus.on eos.turn_complete :474) never touches the set. The dedup key is contextId, but contextId is STABLE across turns on every primary transport: twilio.ts sets state.contextId = contextIdFn(start) ONCE at the 'start' event (:294) and reuses it for every media chunk for the whole call (:310); telnyx.ts identical (:312 set once, reused :351/375/384/...); smartpbx.ts identical (:259 set once, reused :278/309/318). On the browser path, server index.ts :650 does nextContextId = binaryAudio.contextId ?? currentContextId and the browser SDK sendAudioPcm/sendAudioBase64 default contextId to undefined (index.ts :241,:261), so it resolves to the stable currentContextId. Net: after ONE recoverable LLM error, that single stable contextId is added to the set, and line :1000 short-circuits maybeSpeakErrorFallback for EVERY subsequent LLM error for the rest of the call. This directly defeats the G4 'never fail silently' guarantee the code cites at :987-989. The comment 'at most once per turn' is wrong; it is effectively 'at most once per call/session'.
real_fix: Reset the dedup key at a real per-turn boundary. In handleTurnComplete (the eos.turn_complete handler registered at :474), add this.fallbackInjectedContexts.delete(pkt.contextId); so a completed turn re-arms the fallback for the next turn even when the transport reuses the same contextId. This is kimi's suggested fix and is correct: it still prevents duplicate fallbacks for the same in-flight failed turn (the set is populated during the turn, drained when it completes). Keep the existing .clear() in closeOnce() :387 as the session-teardown sweep.
files: packages/voice/src/voice-agent-session.ts:1000 (bug site), reset to add in handleTurnComplete near :474/:564; root cause of stable contextId: packages/voice-server-websocket/src/twilio.ts:294, telnyx.ts:312, smartpbx.ts:259, index.ts:650
